description: Moulded, strapless convertible bra with soft seamless demi cups, for excellent cleaveageTrendy design and double layered cups that provide complete support and excellent cup FitInvisible side bones and silicone gel elastic that holds the bra firmly in placeSoft, adjustable straps that rest comfortably on your shoulders leaving no marks on your skinDetachable straps that can be worn as strapless, cross back, halter neck, single strap or regular
